    Customer Segmentation Analysis

    On This Page

    • Overview
    • Planned Questions
    • Planned Sections

    Overview

    Placeholder page for a customer segmentation case study focused on grouping customers by behavioral patterns and translating those segments into business actions.

    Planned Questions

    • What customer behaviors define distinct segments?
    • Which segments are highest value or highest risk?
    • How can segment-level insights support targeting and retention?

    Planned Sections

    • Business context and segmentation goal
    • Feature engineering from customer behavior
    • Clustering methodology and validation
    • Segment profiles and recommendations

    More details coming soon.
